hooks.command: cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && V1=$(jq -r '.version' .claude-plugin/plugin.json) && V2=$(jq -r '.plugins[0].version' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json) && V3=$(grep -oP 'version-\K[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' README.md | head -1) && if [ "$V1" = "$V2" ] && [ "$V1" = "$V3" ]; then echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'; else echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Version mismatch! plugin.json=$V1, marketplace.json=$V2, README badge=$V3\"}"; fi
